dungeon: Dev teaser — 'ARCANICA' new female boss reveal

attacks: CYAN/turquoise CRYSTALLINE projectiles fired in radial STAR + SPIRAL patterns
described as a chasing/pursuit boss ('you don't want her chasing at you')

mechanics: Short DEV TEASER (branding 'ARCANICA', pink-serpent logo). Text cards: 'ISN'T SHE BEAUTIFUL?', 'you don't want her chasing at you', 'GOOD LUCK DEVS :)', 'hope you're as hyped as I am'. Featured boss = a dark/purple creature firing CYAN CRYSTALLINE radial-star + spiral bullet patterns in a brown cavern. Concurrent galactic chat visible (Cracked Core taunts + 'The Cracked Core has been defeated! (X/25)') — so this runs on the ROTF/RotMG engine with the galactic counter active. NOTE: 'ARCANICA' + 'GOOD LUCK DEVS' suggests this may be a SEPARATE/SUCCESSOR project or a dev-preview, not necessarily core legacy ROTF content.
uncertain: Boss name not given ('she'). Whether ARCANICA = core ROTF or a related/successor server is unclear. Cyan-crystal boss may itself be the teased boss OR an existing one (Cracked Core?) shown alongside.
confidence: LOW-MEDIUM — documents a new female boss's attack VISUALS (cyan crystalline radial/spiral) + ARCANICA branding + concurrent galactic counter; no name/taunts/drops for the featured boss.
